items.title: Boeing Stock Drops. There’s a New Risk to Production Increases.
items.description: Shares slipped despite news that in August, the company delivered 57 planes including 42 MAX jets. That is up from 48 jets and 37 MAX jets in July.

items.title: LATAM Airlines August 2025 Traffic Improves Year Over Year
items.description: LTM flew nearly 7.7 million passengers in August 2025, with traffic up 10.8% year over year, along with a 1.1 pts surge in load factor to 85.4%.

items.title: Boeing delivers 57 jets in August, highest since 2018
items.description: Investing.com -- Boeing delivered 57 jets in August, up from 48 in July, marking its highest August delivery total since 2018 when it handed over 64 airliners.

items.title: Boeing steps up jet deliveries, surpassing 2024 total by August
items.description: Boeing said on Tuesday that it delivered 57 jets in August, up from 48 in July. It was the highest number of deliveries in August since 2018, when the U.S. planemaker handed over 64 airliners. Deliveries last year were hampered in part by a seven-week strike by union workers in the Seattle area, though that stoppage did not begin until September.
